description_long: This is a single-story suburban house set within a rectangular lot, surrounded by a lush garden with numerous trees and flowering shrubs. The house features a flat roof and a clean, modern facade with large windows on the front, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. A driveway leads up to a garage on the left side of the house, with a car parked in front, and a short walkway connects the street to the main entrance. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the front yard is neatly landscaped with grass and ornamental plants. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard, bordered by more trees and greenery, providing privacy and a tranquil outdoor space. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a landscaped yard surrounded by trees and shrubs. Features include a driveway, garage, and a fenced property with lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a tree-lined street with a landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the extensive backyard with rows of trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, privacy trees, and the back facade of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the backyard, side driveway, and the overall layout of the property with dense tree borders.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a short walkway leading from the street, flanked by landscaped greenery and a low fence.
